subcodes.first_line: O luminaries of guidance! I have addressed you with this exhortation, for through the bounty of the Blessed Beauty ye are wholly light [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای انوار هدی شما را باین خطاب مخاطب نمودم زیرا بفضل جمال مبارک سراپا نورید و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love and unity, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @prayer for governments and rulers
